project_type: Next.js 16 App Router site (financial calculators) with Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui components, and recharts
build_system: pnpm with Next.js build. Package manager is pnpm (pnpm-lock.yaml present). No Dockerfile.
test_framework: Playwright for e2e tests in /tests/ directory. Run with 'pnpm test' (playwright test).
verification_instructions: Run 'pnpm build' and verify no TypeScript compilation errors. The build produces static and dynamic pages. Tests require a running dev server.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node.js 20+ required. Uses pnpm.
contribution_requirements: Follow existing patterns: server-side env vars without NEXT_PUBLIC_ prefix, shadcn/ui components, Tailwind CSS classes, lucide-react icons.
key_patterns: 1) API routes use NextRequest/NextResponse in app/api/*/route.ts. 2) Pro status checked via useProStatus() hook from @/lib/hooks/useProStatus. 3) UI uses Card/CardContent/CardHeader from @/components/ui/card, Button from @/components/ui/button, Input from @/components/ui/input. 4) Pro verification on server uses PayPal subscription check. 5) Pages use async server components with generateMetadata. 6) Client components marked 'use client'. 7) Existing solar pages at /solar-roi/page.tsx (city selector) and /solar-roi/[city]/page.tsx (city calculator). 8) Existing SolarForm component at components/calculators/SolarForm.tsx uses recharts for charts.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and API routes. app/api/ - Server API routes. app/solar-roi/ - Existing solar ROI pages. components/ - React components organized by type (ui/, calculators/, premium/, ads/, layouts/, features/). lib/ - Utilities, hooks, contexts, data files. lib/hooks/ - Custom React hooks. lib/contexts/ - React contexts (ProStatusContext). tests/ - Playwright e2e tests. public/ - Static assets.
